title: Figure 2 in Studies on the recombinant production and anticancer activity of thermostable L- asparaginase I from Pyrococcus abyssi
author: Nadeem, M. S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Effect of temperature on the stability and activity of enzyme. The optimum activity of purified enzyme was calculated at 80°C. The enzyme was considerably stable at temperatures up to 100°C.
steps_raw: Figure 2. Effect of temperature on the stability and activity of enzyme. The optimum activity of purified enzyme was calculated at 80°C. The enzyme was considerably stable at temperatures up to 100°C.
